errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: We could not reach our server. Check your connection.

hero.title: Care, close to you.
hero.subtitle: Connect with licensed psychologists, nutritionists, and health experts trusted across Portugal — online, on your schedule, in your language.

trust.title: Verified experts
trust.body: Every expert on Eleva.care is licensed, identity-verified, and chosen for the quality of their practice.

languages.title: Care in your language
languages.body: Sessions in Portuguese, English, and Spanish — pick the language you’re most comfortable with.

instant.title: Book in minutes
instant.body: Pick a time, pay securely, and get a confirmation. Reschedule any time before your session.

categories.title: Find the right kind of support
categories.subtitle: Explore the areas of expertise our partners specialize in.

becomePartner.title: Are you a healthcare professional?
becomePartner.body: Join our marketplace to reach patients across Portugal and beyond. Free to apply.

about.title: About Eleva.care
about.lead: We connect women and families to trusted health expertise — in their language, on their schedule.
about.missionBody: We believe quality care should be accessible everywhere. Eleva.care brings together licensed psychologists, nutritionists, physiotherapists and other health experts in a single, trustworthy marketplace built around real consent, clear pricing, and Portuguese health regulations.

trust.title: Trust over scale
trust.body: We verify every expert, audit our processes, and refuse to grow at the expense of safety.

language.title: Care in your language
language.body: Multilingual experts and a tri-lingual platform from day one — Portuguese, English, Spanish.

compliance.title: Built for Portuguese healthcare
compliance.body: ERS-registered, GDPR-aligned, and integrated with TOConline and Moloni for compliant invoicing.

legal.title: Legal
legal.lead: Our terms, privacy, and cookie policies in plain language.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.summary: How we collect, store, and protect your personal data.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.summary: The rules that apply when you use Eleva.care.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.summary: What we store on your device and why.

legal.placeholderBody: Our legal team is finalising this page. In the meantime, please reach out to legal@eleva.care for any specific question.

marketplace.title: Find an expert
marketplace.subtitle: Search verified experts by specialty, language, or country of practice.

search.results: {count, plural, =0 {No experts found} one {# expert} other {# experts}}

noResults.title: No experts match your filters
noResults.body: Try removing a filter or searching for a different specialty.

category.expertCount: {count, plural, =0 {No experts yet} one {1 expert} other {# experts}}

noExperts.title: No experts yet in this specialty
noExperts.body: We are reviewing applications. Check back soon or browse other specialties.

expert.comingSoonNotice: Booking opens once availability is published.

notFound.title: Profile not found
notFound.body: This page is either reserved or no longer available.

errors.expert-not-found: This expert could not be found. Please check the URL.
errors.event-not-found: This event type is no longer available.
errors.load-failed: Unable to load available times. Please try again.
errors.invalid-slot-start: Invalid time slot. Please select another.
errors.slot_taken: This slot was just booked by someone else. Please choose another.
errors.reserve-failed: Could not reserve this slot. Please try again.
errors.conflict: This time conflicts with an existing booking.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: Apply to join Eleva.care
hero.subtitle: Reach patients across Portugal and beyond. Tell us about your practice — we usually review applications within 3 business days.

account.title: Your public profile
account.subtitle: This is what patients will see on Eleva.care.
account.usernameHelper: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. 3–30 characters.
account.bioPlaceholder: Tell patients about your approach in 2–3 sentences.

fiscal.title: Practice & fiscal information
fiscal.subtitle: We use this to verify your license and prepare invoicing.
fiscal.licenseScopePlaceholder: What does your license authorise you to do?

categories.title: Specialties
categories.subtitle: Pick the specialties patients can find you under (up to 3).

documents.title: Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: Upload your license and any supporting credentials. PDFs and images up to 10 MB each.

errors.wrongType: Only PDF, JPEG, PNG, or WebP accepted.
errors.missingLicense: A professional license is required to apply.

review.title: Review and submit
review.subtitle: Confirm your details below. You will receive an email when our team has reviewed your application.
review.consentLabel: I confirm the information is accurate and consent to Eleva.care contacting me about this application.

unavailable.format-invalid: Use 3–30 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.
unavailable.expert-taken: {username} is already taken by another expert.
unavailable.clinic-taken: {username} is already taken by a clinic.
unavailable.pending-application: {username} is pending approval on another application.

errors.submit: We could not submit your application. Please try again.
errors.auth: Sign in to submit an application.
errors.username: That username is taken. Please pick another.
errors.duplicateApplication: We already have an active application from this account.

success.title: Application received
success.body: Thank you. Our team will review your application and email you within 3 business days.
